name: me.newtripoli/tools
title: New Tripoli — Simulation-Terminal Instrument Suite
description: Interactive, client-side New Tripoli world instruments — feasibility, time-dilation, layer-stack, spectrum, and molecular-assembly calculators grounded in the New Tripoli canon. Emits ChainGraph hash-anchored artifacts with reproducible execution_hash; run_chain and §21.4 decision-gate evaluation. Zero PII.
